---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Who runs into it and when?

## Proposed solution

Describe the behaviour you'd like to see. Code examples or pseudo-code are welcome.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about and why you ruled them out.

## Additional context

Links, related issues, or anything else that helps evaluate the request.
